text: CentOs 6.5 su geoservizi Utente parodi password geoservizi2014 Modificato .bashrc per export proxy Creata dir per pacchetti installazione mkdir install FONT FONT ctr05 Eurobassin tematiche Wingdings Arial Verdana Font da installare sono in I:\webapps\geoservices\geoserver_sld\font.zip cd cd install sudo wget http://geoportale.regione.liguria.it/geoservices/geoserver_sld/font/font.zip unzip font.zip sudo mkdir /usr/share/fonts/ttf sudo cp font/*.* /usr/share/fonts/ttf sudo fc-cache -f –v JDK Download da http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/java-archive-downloads-javase6-419409.html#jdk-6u43-oth-JPR Salvata su macchina parodi.datasiel.net E:\appdata\jdk-6u43-linux-x64.bin E:\progetti\download\jdk-6u43-linux-x64.bin cd /home/parodi/install wget http://parodi.datasiel.net/download/jdk-6u43-linux-x64.bin sudo sh jdk-6u43-linux-x64.bin sudo mv jdk1.6.0_43/ /usr/lib/jvm/ Impostazione jdk sudo /usr/sbin/update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/java java /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/bin/java 1 sudo /usr/sbin/update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/javac javac /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/bin/javac 1 sudo /usr/sbin/update-alternativesdc / --config java (selezionare jdk1.6…..) sudo /usr/sbin/update-alternatives --config javac JAI wget http://download.java.net/media/jai/builds/release/1_1_3/jai-1_1_3-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin sudo cp jai-1_1_3-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/ cd /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/ sudo sh jai-1_1_3-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin (accept license) sudo rm jai-1_1_3-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin ImageIO cd /home/parodi/install wget http://download.java.net/media/jai-imageio/builds/release/1.1/jai_imageio-1_1-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin sudo su cp jai_imageio-1_1-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/ cd /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/ export _POSIX2_VERSION=199209 sh jai_imageio-1_1-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin (accept license) rm jai_imageio-1_1-lib-linux-amd64-jdk.bin LIBRERIA ECW http://osgeo-org.1560.x6.nabble.com/ECW-support-on-Fedora-Linux-error-td4991388.html http://trac.osgeo.org/gdal/wiki/ECW http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/ECW#Building_libecwj INSTALLATA COME ROOT Installazione gcc yum install gcc yum install gcc-c++ yum install patch cd /opt/ sudo wget http://mirror.ovh.net/gentoo-distfiles/distfiles/libecwj2-3.3-2006-09-06.zip sudo unzip libecwj2-3.3-2006-09-06.zip sudo rm libecwj2-3.3-2006-09-06.zip sudo wget http://trac.osgeo.org/gdal/raw-attachment/ticket/3162/libecwj2-3.3-msvc90-fixes.patch sudo patch -p0 < libecwj2-3.3-msvc90-fixes.patch sudo wget http://osgeo-org.1560.x6.nabble.com/attachment/5001530/0/libecwj2-3.3-wcharfix.patch sudo wget http://trac.osgeo.org/gdal/raw-attachment/ticket/3366/libecwj2-3.3-NCSPhysicalMemorySize-Linux.patch cd libecwj2-3.3/ sudo patch -p0 < ../libecwj2-3.3-NCSPhysicalMemorySize-Linux.patch sudo patch -p1 < ../libecwj2-3.3-wcharfix.patch sudo ./configure sudo make sudo make install Viene installato sotto /usr/local/lib/ Creazione link simbolici per GDAL GDAL si aspetta le librerie ecw sotto: /usr/local/lib sudo mkdir /usr/local/libecwj2.3.3 cd /usr/local/libecwj2.3.3 sudo mkdir lib cd lib sudo ln -s /usr/local/lib/libNCSCnet.so.0.0.0 libNCSCnet.so sudo ln -s /usr/local/lib/libNCSEcwC.so.0.0.0 libNCSEcwC.so sudo ln -s /usr/local/lib/libNCSEcw.so.0.0.0 libNCSEcw.so sudo ln -s /usr/local/lib/libNCSUtil.so.0.0.0 libNCSUtil.so sudo mkdir /usr/local/libecwj2.3.3/include sudo cp /usr/local/include/* /usr/local/libecwj2.3.3/include/ GDAL Contiene solo il necessario per Geoserver wget http://demo.geo-solutions.it/share/github/imageio-ext/releases/1.1.X/1.1.7/native/gdal/linux/gdal192-CentOS5.8-gcc4.1.2-x86_64.tar.gz sudo mkdir /opt/gdal-geosolution/ sudo cp gdal192-CentOS5.8-gcc4.1.2-x86_64.tar.gz /opt/gdal-geosolution/ cd /opt/gdal-geosolution/ sudo tar -xzf gdal192-CentOS5.8-gcc4.1.2-x86_64.tar.gz sudo rm –rf gdal192-CentOS5.8-gcc4.1.2-x86_64.tar.gz GDAL DATA wget http://demo.geo-solutions.it/share/github/imageio-ext/releases/1.1.X/1.1.7/native/gdal/gdal-data.zip unzip gdal-data.zip sudo mkdir /opt/gdal_data sudo mv gdal-data/* /opt/gdal_data rm -rf gdal-data* TOMCAT sudo useradd tomcat (Tomcat User is unable to login on purpose) wget http://it.apache.contactlab.it/tomcat/tomcat-6/v6.0.39/bin/apache-tomcat-6.0.39.tar.gz sudo tar -xvzf apache-tomcat-6.0.39.tar.gz sudo mv apache-tomcat-6.0.39 /usr/share/ sudo ln -s /usr/share/apache-tomcat-6.0.39 /usr/share/tomcat sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /usr/share/tomcat/ La CATALINA_HOME è /usr/share/tomcat CREAZIONE CATALINA-BASE sudo mkdir /var/lib/tomcat cd /var/lib/tomcat sudo cp -rf /usr/share/tomcat/ geoserver-master sudo cp -rf /usr/share/tomcat/ geoserver-slavea sudo cp -rf /usr/share/tomcat/ geoserver-slaveb Eliminare tutti i file da (escluso tomcat-juli.jar) dalle bin cd geoserver-master/bin rm * cp /usr/share/tomcat/bin/tomcat-juli.jar . cd /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/bin sudo rm * sudo cp /usr/share/tomcat/bin/tomcat-juli.jar . cd /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slavea/bin sudo rm * sudo cp /usr/share/tomcat/bin/tomcat-juli.jar . cd /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slavea/bin sudo rm * sudo cp /usr/share/tomcat/bin/tomcat-juli.jar . Impostazione proprietario dir e file sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ Configurazione porte Tomcat sudo vi /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/conf/server.xml Nella tabella sottostante i valori assegnati alle suddette porte: Tomcat Instance / Port http AJP SHUTDOWN geoserver-master 8080 8009 8050 geoserver-slave1 8081 8011 8051 geoserver-slaveb 8082 8012 8052 geoserver-slave3 8083 8013 8053 ….. geoserver-slaven 808n 801n 805n Creazione setenv per istanze geoserver sudo vi /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/bin/setenv.sh (*) export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$LD_LIBRARY_PATH:/opt/gdal-geosolution:/usr/lib64 export GDAL_DATA=/opt/gdal_data INSTANCE_NAME=geoserver-master (*) JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43 CATALINA_PID=$CATALINA_BASE/pidfile.pid GEOSERVER_DATA_DIR=/opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR GEOWEBCACHE_CACHE_DIR=/opt/data/GWC_DATA_DIR GEOSERVER_LOG_LOCATION=/var/local/geoserver/logs/$INSTANCE_NAME.log GWC_METASTORE_DISABLED=true GWC_DISKQUOTA_DISABLED=true JAVA_OPTS="-server –Xms2048m –Xmx2048m -XX:MaxPermSize=256m -XX:PermSize=128m " JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -XX:+UseParallelOldGC -XX:+UseParallelGC -XX:NewRatio=2 -XX:+AggressiveOpts -XX:NewSize=48m -Dorg.geotools.shapefile.datetime=true -Djava.awt.headless=true" JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -DGEOSERVER_DATA_DIR=$GEOSERVER_DATA_DIR -DGEOSERVER_LOG_LOCATION=$GEOSERVER_LOG_LOCATION" JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -DGEOWEBCACHE_CACHE_DIR=$GEOWEBCACHE_CACHE_DIR -DGWC_METASTORE_DISABLED=$GWC_METASTORE_DISABLED -DGWC_DISKQUOTA_DISABLED=$GWC_DISKQUOTA_DISABLED" JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -DGEOSERVER_AUDIT_PATH=/opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/$INSTANCE_NAME " JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -Dhttp.proxyHost=proxy.datasiel.net -Dhttp.proxyPort=3128" (***) (*) Ugualmente per altre istanze (geoserver-slavea e geoserver-slaveb) (**) Modificare per altre istanze (***) Impostazione proxy per macchina di test, per esercizio proxy.regione.liguria.it:81 sudo chmod +x /var/lib/tomcat/geoserverMaster/bin/setenv.sh sudo chmod +x /var/lib/tomcat/geoserverSlave1/bin/setenv.sh sudo chmod +x /var/lib/tomcat/geoserverSlave2/bin/setenv.sh NB: aggiunta opzione -Djava.awt.headless=true SCRIPT DI STARTUP DI TOMCAT vi geoserver-master #--------------------------------------------- #!/bin/bash # tomcat Start/Stop the tomcat server. # chkconfig: 2345 90 60 # description: Tomcat script by GeoSolutions export CATALINA_HOME=/usr/share/tomcat export CATALINA_BASE=/var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master prog="Apache Tomcat - GeoServer" USERNAME=tomcat start() { echo -n $"Starting $prog: " echo su $USERNAME -s /bin/sh -c "$CATALINA_HOME/bin/startup.sh" return $? } restart() { stop sleep 5 start } stop() { echo -n $"Stopping $prog: " echo su $USERNAME -s /bin/sh -c "$CATALINA_HOME/bin/shutdown.sh -force" return $? } case "$1" in start) start ;; stop) stop ;; restart) restart ;; *) echo $"Usage: $0 {start|stop|restart}" exit 1 esac #--------------------------------------------- sudo mv geoserver-master /etc/init.d/geoserver-master sudo chmod +x /etc/init.d/geoserver-master sudo chkconfig --add geoserver-master (*) ugualmente per alter istanze Esempio di utilizzo sudo /etc/init.d/geoserver-master start Impostato avvio geoserver al boot sudo vi /etc/rc.local /etc/init.d/geoserver-master start /etc/init.d/geoserver-slave1 start /etc/init.d/geoserver-slave2 start /etc/init.d/geoserver-slave3 start ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- GEOSERVER (2.5.1) cd cd install mkdir geoserver_unzip cd geoserver_unzip wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-war.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-war.zip sudo cp geoserver.war /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver.war sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master GEOSERVER DATA DIR unzip geoserver.war sudo mkdir -p /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR sudo cp -rf data/* /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/ sudo mkdir -p /var/local/geoserver/logs/ sudo chown tomcat:tomcat -R /var/local/geoserver/ sudo mkdir -p /opt/data/GWC_DATA_DIR sudo chown tomcat:tomcat -R /opt/data/ ESTENSIONI GeoServer Prima di installare estensioni stoppare Tomcat: sudo /etc/init.d/geoserver-master stop URL: http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer/2.5.1/extensions/ ORACLE SICCOME UTILIZZO JNDI copio il driver jdbc su lib di tomcat vedi http://www.geo-solutions.it/blog/developers-corner-caveats-geoserver-jndi-configuration/ cd cd install mkdir oracle cd oracle wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-oracle-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-oracle-plugin.zip sudo cp -rf gt-jdbc-oracle-11.1.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master (ugualmente per slave) sudo cp -rf ojdbc14.jar /usr/share/tomcat/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /usr/share/tomcat/lib/ GDAL cd cd install mkdir gdal cd gdal wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-gdal-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-gdal-plugin.zip sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slave1/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slave2/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slave3/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ INSPIRE http://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/extensions/inspire/index.html wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-inspire-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-inspire-plugin.zip sudo cp gs-inspire-2.5.1.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ Control Flow Extension http://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/extensions/controlflow/index.html http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-control-flow-plugin.zip mkdir /controlflow cd /controlflow wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-control-flow-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-control-flow-plugin.zip sudo cp gs-control-flow-2.5.1.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ MONITORING http://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/extensions/monitoring/index.html cd cd install mkdir monitor cd monitor wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-monitor-plugin.zip wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer/2.5.1/extensions/geoserver-2.5.1-monitor-hibernate-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-monitor-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-monitor-hibernate-plugin.zip sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ ATTENZIONE: modalità HIBERNATE non compatibile con cluster. Utilizzo modalità AUDIT (su file) Modifica /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/monitor.properties Aggiunto righe: audit.enabled=true audit.roll_limit=2000 Modifica /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-*/bin/setenv.sh Aggiunto riga: JAVA_OPTS="$JAVA_OPTS -DGEOSERVER_AUDIT_PATH=/opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/geoserver-*" Creato directory: /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/geoserver-master /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/geoserver-slave1 /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/geoserver-slave2 … Creato file /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/header.ftl # start time,services,version,operation,url,response content type,total time,response length,error flag /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/content.ftl ${startTime?datetime?iso_utc_ms},${service!""},${owsVersion!""},${operation!""},"${path!""}?${queryString!""}",${responseContentType!""},${totalTime},${responseLength?c},<#if error??>failed<#else>success</#if> /opt/data/GS_DATA_DIR/monitoring/footer.ftl (VUOTO) WPS http://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/extensions/wps/index.html cd cd install mkdir wps cd wps wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-wps-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-wps-plugin.zip sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ DXF OUTPUT http://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/extensions/dxf/index.html cd cd install mkdir dxf cd dxf wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-dxf-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-dxf-plugin.zip sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ SONO ARRIVATO QUI APP-SCHEMA http://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/data/app-schema/installation.html cd cd install mkdir app-schema cd app-schema wget http://sourceforge.net/projects/geoserver/files/GeoServer%20Extensions/2.5.1/geoserver-2.5.1-app-schema-plugin.zip unzip geoserver-2.5.1-app-schema-plugin.zip sudo cp *.jar /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/WEB-INF/lib/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ ALTRE ISTANZE GEOSERVER E’ sufficiente copiare la webapp da geoserver-master alle altre istanze sudo cp -R /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver/ /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveN/webapps/ sudo cp /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/webapps/geoserver.war /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveN/webapps/ sudo chown -R tomcat:tomcat /var/lib/tomcat/ ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- WATCHDOG cd cd install wget http://demo.geo-solutions.it/share/deploydoc/watchdog/watchdog.sh.master wget http://demo.geo-solutions.it/share/deploydoc/watchdog/watchdog.sh.slavea wget http://demo.geo-solutions.it/share/deploydoc/watchdog/watchdog.sh.slaveb sudo su mv watchdog.sh.master /var/lib/tomcat/geoserverMaster/bin/watchdog.sh mv watchdog.sh.slavea /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slave1/bin/watchdog.sh mv watchdog.sh.slaveb /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveb/bin/watchdog.sh chmod +x /var/lib/tomcat/geoserverMaster/bin/watchdog.sh chmod +x /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slavea/bin/watchdog.sh chmod +x /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveb/bin/watchdog.sh touch /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/logs/watchdog.log touch /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slavea/logs/watchdog.log touch /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveb/logs/watchdog.log echo "*/10 * * * * root /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/bin/watchdog.sh" >> /etc/crontab echo "*/10 * * * * root /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-salvea/bin/watchdog.sh" >> /etc/crontab echo "*/10 * * * * root /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveb/bin/watchdog.sh" >> /etc/crontab /etc/init.d/crond reload LOG ROTATION I log sono /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/logs/catalina.out /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/logs/watchdog.log /var/local/geoserver/logs/geoserver-master.log ….ugualmente per slavea e slaveb cd /etc/logrotate.d sudo vi /etc/logrotate.d/tomcat --- ## GEOSERVER-MASTER /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/logs/catalina.out{ copytruncate daily rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-master/logs/watchdog.log{ copytruncate weekly rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } /var/local/geoserver/logs/geoserver-master.log{ copytruncate weekly rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } ## GEOSERVER-SLAVEA /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slavea/logs/catalina.out{ copytruncate daily rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slavea/logs/watchdog.log{ copytruncate weekly rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } /var/local/geoserver/logs/geoserver-slavea.log{ copytruncate weekly rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } ## GEOSERVER-SLAVEB /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveb/logs/catalina.out{ copytruncate daily rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slaveb/logs/watchdog.log{ copytruncate weekly rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } /var/local/geoserver/logs/geoserver-slaveb.log{ copytruncate weekly rotate 8 missingok notifempty compress nocreate size 10M } --- Java Cryptography Extension (JCE) Unlimited Strength Jurisdiction Policy Files 6 Download da http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/jce-6-download-429243.html unzip jce_policy-6.zip cd jce sudo cp local_policy.jar /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/jre/lib/security/ sudo cp US_export_policy.jar /usr/lib/jvm/jdk1.6.0_43/jre/lib/security/ APACHE HTTPD - CLUSTER Httpd Abilitato partenza automatica httpd con sudo ntsysv Moduli Verificata presenza moduli mod_proxy_*.so in /etc/httpd/modules/ Verificato caricamento moduli mod_proxy_* in /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf Configurazione Configurazione tomcat sudo vi /var/lib/tomcat/geoserver-slave*/conf/server.xml Sostituire linea <Engine name="Catalina" defaultHost="localhost"> Con <Engine name="Catalina" defaultHost="localhost" jvmRoute="geoserver-slave1"> Configurazione apache sudo vi /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf <Proxy balancer://tomcatservers> BalancerMember ajp://localhost:8011 route=geoserver-slave1 retry=60 BalancerMember ajp://localhost:8012 route=geoserver-slave2 retry=60 BalancerMember ajp://localhost:8013 route=geoserver-slave3 retry=60 </Proxy> <Location /geoserver> 	Allow From All 	ProxyPass balancer://tomcatservers/geoserver nofailover=on </Location> NOTA: se si vogliono le sticky session: <Location /geoserver> 	Allow From All 	ProxyPass balancer://tomcatservers/geoserver stickysession=JSESSIONID nofailover=off </Location> Configurazione AJP: <Connector port="8011" protocol="AJP/1.3" redirectPort="8443" maxThreads="20" /> <Connector port="8011" protocol="AJP/1.3" redirectPort="8441" connectionTimeout="10000" keepAliveTimeout="10000" maxThreads="20" /> reload apache sudo /etc/init.d/httpd reload
